summary:
Claim: The false statement regarding thyroglessal duct cyst is that 40% have a subhyoid location.  
Evidence: - Thyroglossal duct cysts most commonly occur in the midline neck, near the thyroid notch. - Only 5–10% of cases are found below the hyoid bone.  
Answer: C
